ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team assigned to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., PercentLackOfCohesion, MaxInheritanceTree) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric type */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or file where the metric is calculated */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the metric applies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_metric_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_type_id") REFERENCES metric_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type (e.g., Cohesion, Inheritance, Coupling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric for composite metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupling_metrics" (
  "coupling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupling metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the coupling metric belongs to */,
  "CountClassDerived" INTEGER /* Count of class derived */,
  "CountClassCoupled" INTEGER /* Count of class coupled */,
  "CountClassBase" INTEGER /* Count of class base */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or file where the coupling metrics are calculated */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the coupling applies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the coupling metric was created */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the coupling metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupling_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug prediction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the bug prediction belongs to */,
  "HeuBug" INTEGER /* Heuristic bug prediction */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or file where the bug prediction applies */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the bug prediction applies */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the bug prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the bug prediction was created */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the bug prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_predictions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the analysis result belongs to */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., pass, fail, warning) */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or file where the analysis was performed */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the analysis applies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis result was created */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module or file where the recommendation applies */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the code where the recommendation applies */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is assigned to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., developer, tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the team member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member the task is assigned to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task is related to */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique commit hash */,
  "commit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the commit */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch of the commit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version control entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version control entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
